plugins.name: superpowers-v
plugins.description: Compound V for Superpowers: triple parallel pre-flight (code archaeology + domain-expert + Context7 library validator), disjoint partitioning, manifest-driven multi-backend dispatch (Claude + Codex + Antigravity + Cursor), git-diff scope enforcement, crash-resumable runs, adaptive tier-based routing, epic mode, research-grounded brainstorming (gated pre-brainstorm recon + batched elicitation), V-memory local-first semantic+lexical recall over docs/superpowers (opt-in pure-python embeddings + a deterministic recall→action bridge), and batched parallel dispatch (Opus default, narrow Sonnet exception)
